level_signals: No mention of managing direct reports
Cross-functional coordination role rather than leadership role

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Minimum 2 years of experience in a high pace, analytical environment such as tier 1 consulting, investment banking or growth stage startups
Excellent project management skills with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and work effectively with cross-functional teams at all levels of the organization
Strong communication and analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights and recommendations
Being a power user of our App and excited about financial markets, banking and financial education

scope.surface: Product-Growth intersection; customer-facing communication and launch strategy across 17 markets
core_responsibilities: Developing the customer facing communication and launch strategy for new and existing products
Coordinating execution of launches across our global growth channels (paid marketing, press, engagement and own social media) across our 17 markets
Collaborating closely with the product management and operations team to funnel back customer insights
Driving data analysis to inform USP, communication, creative and budget decisions within the growth organization as well as tracking performance of campaigns

green_flags: Relocation support explicitly offered for Berlin role
Clear scope: owning intersection of Product and Growth teams across 17 markets
Company scale is significant — 10M+ customers, 150B+ in assets — meaningful product surface
DEI commitment mentioned with a direct point of contact during the interview process
red_flags: Compensation not disclosed anywhere in the JD
Role is onsite Berlin only — no remote or hybrid option mentioned; significant constraint for non-Berlin candidates despite relocation support
Visa sponsorship not explicitly addressed; only relocation support is mentioned
JD is relatively sparse on specifics — unclear team size, tooling, and detailed role expectations

location.visa_sponsorship (set to yes-conditional based on relocation support mention; not explicitly stated)
ambiguities: Visa sponsorship is not explicitly mentioned; only relocation support is offered. Treated as yes-conditional since relocation support implies willingness to hire internationally.
The JD mentions 18 countries in the intro but 17 markets in the responsibilities section — minor inconsistency, both readings captured.

Archetype is ambiguous: the role title says 'Product Growth Manager' but the responsibilities lean heavily toward marketing/GTM coordination rather than product management. Classified as Growth PM with medium confidence.
